title: balsamina mysorensis
intro: Balsamina mysorensis, also known as Mysore Jasmine or Mysore Balsam, is a flowering plant species native to southern India and Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Balsamina mysorensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Balsamina mysorensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
